problem id: 26e985b5
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  01101011 -> 11010101
  00111100 -> 01111001
  11001001 -> 10010100
  11111110 -> 11111011
  00011001 -> 00110010
  01100101 -> 11001001
  01000001 -> 10000000
  10100110 -> 01001001
  11010001 -> 10100100

query: 01111110
predicted answer: 11111111
